_note: This file documents the hooks this plugin needs. The cold-start interview installs them into the user's settings.json. Hook scripts are copied from this directory to the version-independent config path during setup so they survive plugin updates.

UserPromptSubmit.description: Writes a session-start timestamp on the first message of each session, enabling automatic elapsed-time calculation in the billing panel.

Stop.description: Checks whether a legal matter is active and billing is enabled. If yes, outputs {"decision":"block","reason":"..."} to block the session from closing until the attorney logs time via /billing:billing-status --session-end.

_setup_instructions: The cold-start interview replaces ${BILLING_HOOKS_PATH} with the actual config path (~/.claude/plugins/config/claude-for-legal/billing/hooks/) and writes the expanded commands into the user's ~/.claude/settings.json Stop and UserPromptSubmit hook arrays. It also copies session-start.ps1 and billing-stop.ps1 to that config path so they are not lost on plugin update.
